prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins on a black screen.

Later, the scene cuts to a close-up tabletop food arrangement. In the foreground are two pieces of toasted bread, waffles, or similar breakfast food on a plate, topped with small red fruit pieces and pale melting spread or cream. To the left is a glass bowl filled with red strawberries. On the right is a pale yellow pitcher or jug. The background is softly lit in blue tones, giving the food a studio-advertising appearance.

The final frame shifts to a product shot. Two yellow tubs of a spread are displayed on a rocky, layered surface against a purple-to-pink gradient background. The packaging text is visible and reads “SMART BALANCE.” One tub is placed higher and behind the other, emphasizing the brand name and product packaging. No people are visible in the sampled frames.
